# G Mining Excel Reference Library

Domain knowledge reference for G Mining Excel document generation.
Content loaded from the original global skill on demand.

See `~/.claude/skills/gmining-excel/` for full content including:
- SKILL.md — Core workflow and document type overview
- references/document-types.md — FRM, LST, TBE format specifications
- references/visual-standards.md — G Mining visual branding and formatting
- scripts/gmining_styles.py — Reusable openpyxl style definitions

## When to Load

Load `~/.claude/skills/gmining-excel/` content when:
- Generating Excel reports for G Mining projects
- Creating FRM (Form), LST (List), or TBE (Tabulation) documents
- Applying G Mining visual standards to spreadsheets
- Using openpyxl for styled Excel output
